title: Retroforge
description: Build a retrospective tailored to your needs!

home.title: Home

tooltips.start: Open simple mode with swipe-based matching.
tooltips.advanced: Open advanced mode with detailed question flow.
tooltips.coachRetro: Open CoachRetro AI assistant in a new tab.

home.redCardQuestion: The team encountered quite a few difficulties in the last sprint.
home.whiteCardQuestion: I master Scrum like a boss.

hammerSwipe.title: Simple Mode
hammerSwipe.description: Swipe left or right to get the most suitable retrospective!

deepAnvil.title: Advanced Mode
deepAnvil.description: Select the answer that best matches your needs from the list to get the most suitable retrospective!

retrospectives.NOT_PERTINENT: We couldn't find any relevant retrospectives based on your answers, but here's a list of retrospectives that might be useful to you.
retrospectives.NO_MATCH: The answers you provided didn't allow us to find a suitable retrospective, please review your answers.
retrospectives.MATCHED: Here's a list of retrospectives tailored to your needs
retrospectives.canMatch: These retrospectives might also interest you
retrospectives.title: All retrospectives
